title: bd dashboard
html:
BD Dashboard — White-Space Summary

Last updated: 2026-04-12 Accounts covered: J&J, Pfizer, EMD Serono, Merck, Genmab, Novo Nordisk

Portfolio Snapshot

Account AO FY26 Target FY26 YTD Gap White-Space Identified Vinoth's Role
J&J Dave Johnson $5.0M $4.1M (82%) $475K $810K weighted pipeline from top 10 Own MSL/Onc content, BD support to Anna/Sara
Pfizer Rich Durante $575K ~$302K $273K ~$350K weighted from top 10 Own Abrysvo, co-drive expansion with Nick
Merck Dave Johnson $2.1M $666K (32%) $766K Renewals + Gardasil + Message Testing Ensure E7 delivery excellence, support Dave
Genmab Dave Johnson $1.47M $482K (33%) $718K RINA-S pre-launch is the swing factor E6 delivery (Winston, Aruna), flag RINA-S
EMD Serono Rich Durante $160K ~$160K ~$0 $100-200K upside via ATU/HCP-Pt Own Bavencio, use relationship to expand
Novo Nordisk Dave Johnson $400K $0 (0%) $400K Near zero — budgets frozen Deprioritize. 1hr/month max.
Total $9.73M $5.71M $2.63M

Top 10 Opportunities Across All Accounts

# Account Opportunity Est. Revenue Probability Weighted Timeline Owner
1 J&J TREMFYA IMM PET Takeover $300K 70% $210K Q2-Q3 FY26 Sara Farina + Vinoth
2 Genmab RINA-S Pre-Launch Bundle $325K 40% $130K Pitch Apr-May Dave/Melissa + Vinoth (E6 delivery)
3 J&J CARVYKTI PET Legend Co-Promote $175K 50% $88K 2H26 Anna + Vinoth
4 J&J RYBREVANT Message Testing $260K 55% $143K Q2 FY26 Anna + Vinoth (content lead)
5 Merck Gardasil PET Reactivation $150K 45% $68K Q2-Q3 FY26 Melissa
6 Pfizer Paxlovid HCPP $75K 50% $38K Q1-Q2 FY26 Nick via Gavin Hansen
7 J&J INLEXZO PET/SFEA $125K 60% $75K Q2 FY26 Anna + Austino (delivery)
8 Pfizer Nurtec HCPP $75K 45% $34K Q2 FY26 Nick via Aimee Renaud
9 Merck Keytruda Global Message Testing $200K 40% $80K Q2-Q3 FY26 Melissa + Chanakya (delivery)
10 EMD Bavencio ATU Extension $60K 60% $36K Q2 FY26 Vinoth direct (owns relationship)

Total weighted pipeline from top 10: ~$902K — covers 34% of the $2.63M total gap.

Where Vinoth's Time Matters Most for BD

Direct lever (Vinoth pitches or co-pitches)

  • J&J RYBREVANT Message Testing — Vinoth's content depth on Rybrevant makes him the natural pitch lead
  • EMD Bavencio ATU — Vinoth owns the relationship; only he can propose this
  • J&J INLEXZO PET — Austino delivers, but Vinoth's oncology credibility opens the door

Delivery lever (Vinoth's clusters deliver, which earns renewals/expansions)

  • Merck — E7 delivery quality (Chanakya, Vidhya, Madhur) directly impacts $2.1M renewal base
  • Genmab — E6 delivery (Winston, Aruna on MSL) protects the $1.47M base and earns RINA-S pitch rights
  • Pfizer — E8 delivery (Ayush, Jaya on Abrysvo) is the proof case for expansion into new Pfizer brands

Not worth Vinoth's time right now

  • Novo Nordisk — $0 YTD, budgets frozen, key contact left. Revisit August 2026.

Monthly BD Actions

April 2026

  • J&J: Discuss RYBREVANT Message Testing with Anna — FY26 timing
  • Genmab: Flag RINA-S pitch window to Dave/Melissa — if not pitched by May, 2H26 window narrows
  • EMD: Propose Bavencio ATU to Nick/client during next Bavencio readout
  • Pfizer: Check if Paxlovid HCPP intro happened via Gavin Hansen

May 2026

  • J&J: INLEXZO PET pitch (launch is maturing)
  • J&J: CARVYKTI PET Legend co-promote — assess timing with Anna
  • Merck: AI addendum in MSA — is it resolved? Blocks Sagan follow-up quals.
  • Pfizer: Nurtec HCPP intro via Aimee Renaud

June 2026

  • Mid-year review: Which of the top 10 converted? Which stalled?
  • Genmab: RINA-S decision point — if not progressing, reassess
  • J&J: TREMFYA IMM PET — is the takeover happening?

Accounts Needing AO Plan Enrichment

Account Current Depth What's Missing
J&J Deep (6 files + white-space) Nothing critical
Pfizer Good (overview + white-space) Contacts file, financials detail
Merck Overview + white-space Contacts file, active projects detail
Genmab Overview + white-space Contacts file
EMD Serono Overview + white-space Contacts, relationship mapping
Novo Nordisk Overview + white-space Honest — not worth building until engagement resumes

Refresh monthly or when new AO plan data is shared. Use bd command to view this dashboard.

Back to Accounts Hub | Home
